prompt: Open a new Terminal window (Cmd+N or via the File menu) and then write the text 'window-opened' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/283-confirm.txt to confirm the action completed. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal open_new_window' followed by cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && echo window-opened > ~/Desktop/kinbench/283-confirm.txt"'.
